summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2 comprehensively. A shared getTodayIST() utility with hardcoded UTC+5:30 offset was added to dateRange.ts, and it is used consistently across DailyParticipationGrid.tsx (REQ-1), CashPaymentForm.tsx, OtherPendingAmountForm.tsx, CarExpensesPanel.tsx, MultiCategoryExpenseForm.tsx, CoTravellerIncomeDialog.tsx, App.tsx (auto-toll logic), and useAutoTollSettings.ts (REQ-2). All requirements appear to be fully satisfied.
